bupt.ta.llm

类 LlmMatchInsightService

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.llm.LlmMatchInsightService

  • public final class LlmMatchInsightService
extends java.lang.Object
    Optional DeepSeek-generated narrative on top of rule-based AIMatchService.MatchResult.

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      LlmMatchInsightService()
      Uses environment-driven DeepSeekClient configuration.
      LlmMatchInsightService(DeepSeekClient client) 

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      java.lang.String buildInsight(TAProfile profile, Job job, AIMatchService.MatchResult match) 
      java.lang.String buildInsightStream(TAProfile profile, Job job, AIMatchService.MatchResult match, java.util.function.Consumer<java.lang.String> onChunk)
      Streaming counterpart of buildInsight(bupt.ta.model.TAProfile, bupt.ta.model.Job, bupt.ta.ai.AIMatchService.MatchResult).

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 构造器详细资料

      • LlmMatchInsightService

        public LlmMatchInsightService()
        Uses environment-driven DeepSeekClient configuration.

      • LlmMatchInsightService

        public LlmMatchInsightService(DeepSeekClient client)
        参数:
        client - LLM client (typically from admin settings in the web app)

    • 方法详细资料

      • buildInsight

        public java.lang.String buildInsight(TAProfile profile,
                                     Job job,
                                     AIMatchService.MatchResult match)
        参数:
        profile - applicant profile (may be null)
        job - job posting
        match - rule-based match result (may be null)
        返回:
        short English paragraph, or null if the API is unavailable or fails

      • buildInsightStream

        public java.lang.String buildInsightStream(TAProfile profile,
                                           Job job,
                                           AIMatchService.MatchResult match,
                                           java.util.function.Consumer<java.lang.String> onChunk)
                                    throws java.io.IOException
        Streaming counterpart of buildInsight(bupt.ta.model.TAProfile, bupt.ta.model.Job, bupt.ta.ai.AIMatchService.MatchResult). Each token chunk is delivered to onChunk as it arrives; the full text is returned once the stream finishes.
        参数:
        profile - applicant profile (may be null)
        job - job posting (required)
        match - rule-based match result (may be null)
        onChunk - receives each streamed token
        返回:
        full generated text after the stream completes
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - on transport or API errors
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the client is not configured
